reviews.comment: 🌟 *"WALKED IN, COFFEE SHOP SLAPPED ME IN THE FACE (in the best way!) 😂* Spot’s got major vibes + flavours galore! Hospitality? Top-tier – felt like fam 💖. Quick service = no waiting for a buzz 🍵. Caught Life Bingo by Misfit here – PERFECT venue! If you need a chill spot with fire coffee and rad events, this is IT 👌"

reviewReply.comment:
Love the energy!
Glad the vibes, flavours, and hospitality hit just right and that the space worked perfectly for events too. Quick service, great coffee, and a welcoming atmosphere is exactly what we aim for. Looking forward to having you back for many more buzz-worthy visits!

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/15767443270777125242/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25BNExYZDJWVkl4ZW1seVIxQXROemxLTFRKSk9XYxAB

reviews.comment: Great experience, as good as in their GK2 outlet, they don’t serve Turkish Coffee in Gurgaon though, which is one of my favourites. Tried their Spanish Bombon, & in love with it. Try Spanish Bombon here,  18gms of coffee in a 90ml cup with condensed milk. Its a compete coffee experience, from variety of coffees to merchandise they have it all. Island pour over Americano was refreshing. Various food options, Croissant & walnut brownie were nice. Beautiful cafe with a great view of porch & overlooking Metro, made experience better.

reviewReply.comment: Glad to know you had a great experience and enjoyed exploring so many of our offerings! Wonderful to hear the Spanish Bombon stood out for you it’s truly a bold, immersive cup. Happy the pour-over Americano, food, merchandise, and the café view all came together to make your visit memorable. Looking forward to welcoming you again for more Coffee Island moments. ☕✨

reviews.comment: We tried a couple of things. The skewers weren't anything great but the soup momos were delicious.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Manas, thank you for taking the time to leave a review. We noticed the dishes mentioned might belong to another restaurant, since skewers and soup momos are not part of the Coffee Island menu.

We just wanted to check if this review was intended for a different place. If so, we would really appreciate it if you could update or remove it so your experience is reflected accurately. It helps other guests and also ensures fair feedback for all restaurants.

Thank you for your understanding and for helping keep reviews useful for the community.
